summary: Surah Al-Fath proclaims the clear victory granted by Allah to Prophet Muhammad and the believers, referring to the Treaty of Hudaybiyyah. It highlights Allah’s forgiveness, mercy, and fulfillment of promises, and describes the rewards for faith, obedience, and loyalty to the Prophet. The surah contrasts the fate of the believers with the hypocrites and disbelievers, promises further victories, and praises the noble character and unity of the Prophet’s companions.

groups.title: Section: Clear Victory, Completion of Favour, Guidance and Help; Tranquility in Believers’ Hearts; Success for the Faithful, Punishment for Hypocrites and Polytheists
